sentences.text: No complaints on my end almost made it to Friday.

I don't know if they filled you in on anything like that.

But if you're already in conversations with them, then I definitely don't.
Wanna you know, waste your time.
Yeah, I guess real quick to catch up to speed if you have a couple of minutes.
So yeah, I had a couple of Demos with the both of them.

I let them kind of trial out one of your assets for free to check in and just test the data and at the end of last month, Leslie basically said, we're working through finalized budgets on track to work with you all in the beginning of the New Year.

and then I just let her know that.
